description_long: This is a rectangular hardcover book with a vibrant red cover, accented by a yellow border along the edges. The front and back covers feature a swirling, bokeh-like pattern in lighter shades of red and orange, giving the book a festive and eye-catching appearance. Handwritten-style gold text is visible on both the front and back covers, adding a personal and artistic touch. The spine is also red with gold handwritten text running vertically. The book's pages are a pale cream color, visible from the side view. The overall design suggests a celebratory or commemorative theme, with a modern and playful aesthetic.
description: A red hardcover book with gold handwritten text and a festive, bokeh-patterned cover.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, featuring red color with gold handwritten text running vertically.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, displaying a red background with a bokeh pattern and large gold handwritten text.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the side, revealing the pale cream-colored pages and yellow-edged covers.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, matching the front in color and pattern, with additional gold handwritten text.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is red with a yellow border and features gold handwritten text running vertically. The design is simple and matches the festive style of the covers.
